User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block API endpoints — saves crawl budget and reduces data exposure
Disallow: /api/
# Block auth-gated pages that redirect crawlers — wasted crawl budget
Disallow: /messages
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /profile
Disallow: /verify-email
Disallow: /reset-password

Sitemap: https://spiritrevivalafrica.com/sitemap.xml
